'Almost every line of the dialogue sounds like it comes from an old movie,' the reviewer wrote." So the key points here are: 1. The attack scenes (which are 40 minutes long) are described as powerful. 2. The reviewer was less impressed with the characters and the love story. 3. The reviewer says the dialogue sounds like it's from an old movie, which implies it's not original. So B is incorrect. C) The characters and the love story are less attractive. The passage states the reviewer was "less impressed with the characters and the love story," which aligns with option C. So C seems correct. D) The attack scenes occupy too much time.
